summary: Bug fix verification complete - 100% success. The missing route aliases /cooperative/add-parcel and /cooperative/field-agents are now correctly defined in App.js. Both routes load their respective pages (AddParcelPage and FieldAgentsPage) without blank pages. All 12 cooperative sub-routes return HTTP 200 and UI components render correctly.

issues: React hydration warning about <span> inside <tbody> - minor issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: App.js: Route aliases correctly added - /cooperative/add-parcel (line 197) and /cooperative/field-agents (line 208)
Both routes render respective components: AddParcelPage and FieldAgentsPage
Dashboard.jsx: Quick actions 'Enregistrer une Parcelle' navigates to /cooperative/parcels/new (line 194) and 'Agents Terrain' navigates to /cooperative/agents (line 278) - both work
AddParcelPage: Member dropdown loads via /api/cooperative/members - returns full_name and phone_number as expected
FieldAgentsPage: Agents list loads via /api/cooperative/agents - returns empty list (normal, no agents created yet)

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 API tests passed - auth, dashboard, members, agents)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (13/13 route tests passed, all UI components rendered)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Route alias bug fixed. All 12 cooperative routes verified: /cooperative/dashboard, /cooperative/members, /cooperative/parcels/new, /cooperative/add-parcel (alias), /cooperative/lots, /cooperative/distributions, /cooperative/reports, /cooperative/carbon-premiums, /cooperative/ssrte, /cooperative/qrcodes, /cooperative/notifications, /cooperative/agents, /cooperative/field-agents (alias). Backend APIs /api/cooperative/dashboard, /api/cooperative/members, /api/cooperative/agents all return 200 with expected data.

features_verified./cooperative/add-parcel route: PASS - Loads AddParcelPage with member dropdown
features_verified./cooperative/field-agents route: PASS - Loads FieldAgentsPage with agent list
features_verified.All cooperative sub-pages: PASS - members, lots, distributions, reports, carbon-premiums, ssrte, qrcodes, notifications all load
features_verified./api/cooperative/dashboard: PASS - Returns 200 with coop_info, members, parcels, lots, financial data
features_verified./api/cooperative/members: PASS - Returns 200 with members array (full_name, phone_number fields present)
features_verified./api/cooperative/agents: PASS - Returns 200 with empty list (normal - no agents created)

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Routes /cooperative/add-parcel and /cooperative/field-agents not defined in App.js causing blank pages
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added route aliases in App.js: line 197 for add-parcel, line 208 for field-agents
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: Both routes now load correct components - bug is FIXED
